name: PER_MANAGER_HRCHY_CF
description: This table stores the column flattened manager hierarchy details. The denormalized details are derived from the supervisors tables and stored in this table.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies an person. Foreign key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies an assignment. Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: MANAGER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Identifies the role this supervisor has with regards to the overall organization structure: functional, project leader, etc.

columns.Name: LEVEL1_MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies an LEVEL1 manager's person record. Foreign key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: LEVEL1_MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies the LEVEL1 manager's assignment. Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M.

columns.Name: LEVEL2_MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies an LEVEL 2	 manager's person record. Foreign key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: LEVEL2_MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies the LEVEL 2  manager's assignment. Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

indexes.Columns: PERSON_ID, ASSIGNMENT_ID, EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, MANAGER_TYPE, LEVEL1_MANAGER_ID, LEVEL1_MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
